scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.dev:serve: browser-sync start --server . --startPath /preview.html --files assets/css/main.css --files preview.html --files assets/js --files partials --no-notify --port 5173
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n scss,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run watch:css" "npm run dev:serve"
